description:
Launch readiness audit for hx-tree-view. Using the documentation template from the FOUNDATION ticket, ensure this component is production-ready.

## SUB-COMPONENTS INCLUDED (MANDATORY)
This ticket also covers **hx-tree-item** (`hx-tree-view/hx-tree-item.ts`). This is a registered custom element that must be validated for A11y, exports, and documentation alongside the parent. Do NOT skip it.

## Checklist
1. **A11y healthcare compliance** — Run axe-core audit on BOTH hx-tree-view AND hx-tree-item. Verify ARIA roles (tree/treeitem pattern per WAI-ARIA APG), keyboard navigation (Arrow keys for expand/collapse/navigate, Home, End, Enter/Space), aria-expanded, aria-level, aria-posinset, aria-setsize. Zero WCAG 2.1 AA violations.
2. **Astro documentation page** — Create/update doc page using the standard template. All 12 sections filled. Must document hx-tree-item API too.
3. **Individual export test** — Verify import works in isolation and exports BOTH elements.
4. **Existing tests pass** — Run `npm run verify`. Do NOT run vitest directly.

## Known Patterns (from HELIX-PLATFORM-PROTO-LESSONS.md)
- C-PATTERN-01: Never add `= null` to `@query` fields — use `!` assertion
- C-PATTERN-02: Never call `setAttribute()` in constructor — use `connectedCallback()`
- C-PATTERN-06: Register event listeners BEFORE any `await` calls

## Files
- `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-tree-view/` (includes hx-tree-item.ts)
- `apps/docs/src/content/docs/component-library/hx-tree-view.md`

## Acceptance Criteria
- Zero axe-core violations (both parent and sub-component)
- Doc page complete per template (sub-component API documented)
- Individual import works in standalone HTML (both elements render)
- `npm run verify` passes
title: LAUNCH READY: hx-tree-view

## SUB-COMPONENTS INCLUDED (MANDATORY)
This ticket also covers **hx-tree-item** (`hx-tree-view/hx-tree-item.ts`). This is a registered custom element that must be validated for A11y, exports, and documentation alongside the parent. Do NOT skip it.

Verify ARIA roles (tree/treeitem pattern per WAI-ARIA APG), keyboard navigation (Arrow keys for expand/collapse/navigate, Home, End, Enter/Space), aria-expanded, aria-level, aria-posinset, aria-setsize.
